data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for refund logic that handles foreign exchange (FX) differences. However, the evidence provided does not include any information or checks related to the handling of FX differences during refunds. The only relevant evidence pertains to bookings made in USD, with no mention of how FX differences are managed, leading to a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of refund logic that handles FX differences.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
